[[BLOCK:slide14_shape1]]
Also referred to as Regularized Regression (Regularized Regression): The objective is to minimize variance and enhance the model's generalization capability, thereby preventing overfitting.  
Also referred to as penalized regression: The model is penalized if it becomes overly complex or exhibits inflated fitness, promoting simplicity in accordance with the "Keep It Simple, Stupid" (KISS) principle.
